ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, admin, developer) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player's account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., ranked match, tournament) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  "duration" REAL /* Average duration of a match in the game mode */,
  "is_ranked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game mode is ranked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the statistic belongs to */,
  "trophies" INTEGER /* Number of trophies earned by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "king_tower" INTEGER /* Number of king towers won by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player in the game mode */,
  "total_time_played" REAL /* Total time spent playing the game mode */,
  "average_match_duration" REAL /* Average duration of matches played by the player in the game mode */,
  "highest_trophy" INTEGER /* The highest number of trophies the player has ever achieved in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_levels" (
  "card_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card level */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the card level belongs to */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "card_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the card */,
  "card_experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_levels_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_level_diff" (
  "total_level_diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total level difference */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the total level difference belongs to */,
  "total_level_diff" INTEGER /* Total level difference earned by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches used to calculate the total level difference */,
  "average_level_diff" REAL /* Average level difference per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_level_diff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_level_diff_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_diff_per_match" (
  "level_diff_per_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level difference per match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the level difference per match belongs to */,
  "level_diff_per_match" REAL /* Level difference per match earned by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches used to calculate the level difference per match */,
  "max_level_diff" INTEGER /* Maximum level difference in a single match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_diff_per_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_diff_per_match_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the progress belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the progress entry */,
  "trophies" INTEGER /* Number of trophies earned by the player at the time of the entry */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player at the time of the entry */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player at the time of the entry */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player at the time of the progress entry */,
  "card_levels" TEXT /* JSON object containing the levels of all cards at the time of the progress entry */,
  "total_level_diff" INTEGER /* Total level difference at the time of the progress entry */,
  "level_diff_per_match" REAL /* Level difference per match at the time of the progress entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_history" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the match belongs to */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the match belongs to */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_duration" REAL /* Duration of the match */,
  "level_diff" INTEGER /* Level difference between the player and the opponent in the match */,
  "card_usage" TEXT /* JSON object containing the cards used by the player in the match */,
  "opponent_card_usage" TEXT /* JSON object containing the cards used by the opponent in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the opponent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the opponent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the opponent joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the opponent's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the opponent's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator's account (hashed for security) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the administrator joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the administrator's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the administrator's account is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the administrator has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
